falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'bottom' pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% of the 20-day average on a single day with a bearish engulfing candle
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a blowoff top pattern would directly contradict the bottom_2024_aug pattern and invalidate the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Central bank intervenes with a rate hike of 50+ basis points within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would create volatility and trend reversal dynamics incompatible with the current HOLD signal and blowoff score.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
